briefs.title: BC Insurance Licensing Rules Overhauled — Key Exemptions Removed Starting January 2027
briefs.summary: BC is updating its insurance licensing rules, effective January 1, 2027. Several exemptions (situations where a business could sell insurance without a licence) are being removed — including ones for travel insurance, credit insurance, and funeral services insurance — while new rules are added for product warranty insurance sold alongside a product.
briefs.action_required: Review whether your business sells any insurance products and confirm you have the correct licence before January 1, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC insurance licensing exemption changes take effect — B.C. Reg. 246/2025
